```csharp
public static void WriteLine(string? value)
```
Writes the specified string value, followed by the current line terminator, to the standard output stream.

```csharp
public static void Write(string? value)
```
Writes the specified string value to the standard output stream without a trailing line terminator.

```csharp
public static string? ReadLine()
```
Reads the next line of characters from the standard input stream. Returns null if no more lines are available.

```csharp
public static ConsoleKeyInfo ReadKey(bool intercept = false)
```
Obtains the next character or function key pressed by the user. Optionally suppresses display of the pressed key.

```csharp
public static void WriteLine(string? message)
```
Writes a message followed by a line terminator to the trace listeners in the Debug.Listeners collection.

```csharp
public static string Format(string format, params object?[] args)
```
Replaces one or more format items in a string with the string representation of corresponding objects. Supports composite formatting with alignment and format specifiers.

```csharp
public static string Join(string? separator, IEnumerable<string?> values)
```
Concatenates the members of a collection, using the specified separator between each member.

```csharp
public static bool IsNullOrEmpty(string? value)
```
Indicates whether the specified string is null or an empty string (""). Equivalent to `value == null || value.Length == 0`.

```csharp
public static bool IsNullOrWhiteSpace(string? value)
```
Indicates whether a specified string is null, empty, or consists only of white-space characters.

```csharp
public static string Concat(params string?[] values)
```
Concatenates one or more instances of String, or the String representations of the values of one or more objects.

```csharp
public static int Compare(string? strA, string? strB, StringComparison comparisonType)
```
Compares two specified String objects using the specified comparison rules, and returns an integer indicating their relative position in the sort order.

```csharp
public string Substring(int startIndex, int length)
```
Retrieves a substring from this instance starting at a specified character position with a specified length.

```csharp
public bool Contains(string value, StringComparison comparisonType)
```
Returns a value indicating whether a specified substring occurs within this string, using the specified comparison rules.

```csharp
public bool StartsWith(string value, StringComparison comparisonType)
```
Determines whether the beginning of this string instance matches the specified string when compared using the specified comparison option.

```csharp
public bool EndsWith(string value, StringComparison comparisonType)
```
Determines whether the end of this string instance matches the specified string when compared using the specified comparison option.

```csharp
public int IndexOf(string value, StringComparison comparisonType)
```
Reports the zero-based index of the first occurrence of the specified string within this instance. Returns -1 if not found.

```csharp
public string Replace(string oldValue, string? newValue)
```
Returns a new string in which all occurrences of a specified string in the current instance are replaced with another specified string.

```csharp
public string[] Split(char separator, StringSplitOptions options = None)
```
Splits a string into substrings based on a specified delimiting character and, optionally, options to trim and remove empty entries.

```csharp
public string Trim()
```
Removes all leading and trailing white-space characters from the current string.

```csharp
public string ToUpper()
```
Returns a copy of this string converted to uppercase, using the casing rules of the current culture.

```csharp
public string ToLower()
```
Returns a copy of this string converted to lowercase, using the casing rules of the current culture.

```csharp
public class List<T> : IList<T>, IReadOnlyList<T>
```
Represents a strongly typed list of objects that can be accessed by index. Provides methods to search, sort, and manipulate lists.

```csharp
public class Dictionary<TKey, TValue> : IDictionary<TKey, TValue>, IReadOnlyDictionary<TKey, TValue>
```
Represents a collection of keys and values. Provides O(1) average-time lookups by key.

```csharp
public class HashSet<T> : ISet<T>, IReadOnlySet<T>
```
Represents a set of values. Provides high-performance set operations such as union, intersection, and difference.

```csharp
public class Queue<T> : IEnumerable<T>, IReadOnlyCollection<T>
```
Represents a first-in, first-out (FIFO) collection of objects.

```csharp
public class Stack<T> : IEnumerable<T>, IReadOnlyCollection<T>
```
Represents a variable size last-in, first-out (LIFO) collection of instances of the same specified type.

```csharp
public static IEnumerable<TSource> Where<TSource>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source, Func<TSource, bool> predicate)
```
Filters a sequence of values based on a predicate. Returns elements for which the predicate returns true.

```csharp
public static IEnumerable<TResult> Select<TSource, TResult>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source, Func<TSource, TResult> selector)
```
Projects each element of a sequence into a new form by applying a transform function.

```csharp
public static IEnumerable<TResult> SelectMany<TSource, TResult>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source, Func<TSource, IEnumerable<TResult>> selector)
```
Projects each element to an IEnumerable<T> and flattens the resulting sequences into one sequence.

```csharp
public static IOrderedEnumerable<TSource> OrderBy<TSource, TKey>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source, Func<TSource, TKey> keySelector)
```
Sorts the elements of a sequence in ascending order according to a key.

```csharp
public static IEnumerable<IGrouping<TKey, TSource>> GroupBy<TSource, TKey>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source, Func<TSource, TKey> keySelector)
```
Groups the elements of a sequence according to a specified key selector function.

```csharp
public static TSource First<TSource>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source)
```
Returns the first element of a sequence. Throws InvalidOperationException if the sequence contains no elements.

```csharp
public static TSource? FirstOrDefault<TSource>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source)
```
Returns the first element of a sequence, or a default value if the sequence contains no elements.

```csharp
public static bool Any<TSource>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source, Func<TSource, bool> predicate)
```
Determines whether any element of a sequence satisfies a condition.

```csharp
public static bool All<TSource>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source, Func<TSource, bool> predicate)
```
Determines whether all elements of a sequence satisfy a condition.

```csharp
public static int Count<TSource>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source)
```
Returns the number of elements in a sequence. An overload accepts a predicate to count only matching elements.

```csharp
public static int Sum(this IEnumerable<int> source)
```
Computes the sum of a sequence of numeric values. Overloads exist for int, long, float, double, and decimal.

```csharp
public static IEnumerable<TSource> Distinct<TSource>(this IEnumerable<TSource> source)
```
Returns distinct elements from a sequence by using the default equality comparer to compare values.

```csharp
public static Task<Task> WhenAny(IEnumerable<Task> tasks)
```
Creates a task that will complete when any of the supplied tasks have completed.

```csharp
public static Task<TResult> FromResult<TResult>(TResult result)
```
Creates a Task<TResult> that is completed successfully with the specified result.

```csharp
public static int Max(int val1, int val2)
```
Returns the larger of two specified numbers. Overloads exist for all numeric types.

```csharp
public static int Min(int val1, int val2)
```
Returns the smaller of two specified numbers. Overloads exist for all numeric types.

```csharp
public static int Abs(int value)
```
Returns the absolute value of a specified number. Overloads exist for all signed numeric types.

```csharp
public static double Sqrt(double d)
```
Returns the square root of a specified number. Returns NaN if d is negative.

```csharp
public static double Pow(double x, double y)
```
Returns a specified number raised to the specified power.

```csharp
public static double Round(double value, int digits)
```
Rounds a double-precision floating-point value to a specified number of fractional digits using banker's rounding by default.

```csharp
public static int Parse(string s)
```
Converts the string representation of a number to its 32-bit signed integer equivalent. Throws FormatException if the string is not valid.

```csharp
public static bool TryParse(string? s, out int result)
```
Converts the string representation of a number to its 32-bit signed integer equivalent. Returns whether the conversion succeeded without throwing an exception.

```csharp
public static Guid NewGuid()
```
Initializes a new instance of the Guid structure with a cryptographically random value (version 4 UUID).

```csharp
public static DateTime Now { get; }
```
Gets a DateTime object that is set to the current date and time on this computer, expressed as the local time.

```csharp
public static DateTime UtcNow { get; }
```
Gets a DateTime object that is set to the current date and time on this computer, expressed as Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).

```csharp
public static IEnumerable<int> Range(int start, int count)
```
Generates a sequence of integral numbers within a specified range, starting from start and containing count sequential integers.

```csharp
public static IEnumerable<TResult> Empty<TResult>()
```
Returns an empty IEnumerable<T> that has the specified type argument. The returned singleton is cached.

```csharp
public static IEnumerable<TResult> Repeat<TResult>(TResult element, int count)
```
Generates a sequence that contains one repeated value a specified number of times.
